name: World Finance
description_short: Indianapolis World Finance at 3467 W 86th St offers personal loans with flexible terms and quick decision times for residents seeking emergency or installment credit.
description_long:
World Finance on West 86th Street in Indianapolis, IN serves the south-central corridor of the city with direct personal lending services. Located at 3467 W 86th St in a standalone commercial office, this Indianapolis branch is accessible to residents and workers throughout the area. The office operates Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM, and is closed on weekends.

This Indianapolis location specializes in personal loans for various purposes, from emergency expenses to larger installment credit. Loan officers at the W 86th St branch work with applicants to structure repayment terms that fit different financial situations. To discuss your borrowing needs or schedule an appointment, call 317-876-0169.

If you live or work near West 86th Street in Indianapolis and need personal credit, bring a valid government ID and proof of recent income to your appointment. Most applicants in the IN market can receive credit decisions and fund their loans within hours. World Finance serves borrowers across different credit profiles and backgrounds.
pros: In-person branch service with dedicated loan officers for one-on-one consultations and contract explanations
Multiple products beyond loans: tax preparation, refund advances, and roadside assistance in one location
Credit-building loans available for borrowers specifically focused on establishing credit history
Bilingual support explicitly offered ("Hablamos Español") for Spanish-speaking customers
Established community presence with staff who live in the service areas and branch manager contact information
Recent positive Google reviews (within 2 months) citing professionalism, quality, responsiveness, and value
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–5:30 PM) and Saturday availability for working individuals
cons: APR ranges, loan amounts, and specific eligibility requirements are not disclosed on the website
No online application or origination process mentioned; requires phone call or in-person visit
Limited information about required documentation beyond vague reference to "documents and information you need to qualify"
No stated timeline for loan funding or approval decision process
Customer review section shows only positive reviews with minimal detail, no independent third-party rating data
best_for: Borrowers who prefer in-person service and want to discuss loan options face-to-face with a loan officer
Individuals building credit for the first time or rebuilding credit who specifically want credit-building loan products
Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Memphis area seeking bilingual financial services
Customers who need bundled services (loans, tax prep, roadside assistance) from a single provider
diagnosis: World Finance is best for borrowers who value personalized, in-person service and want to discuss loan options with a dedicated loan officer before committing. The main caveat is that actual loan terms, APR ranges, and specific eligibility requirements are not transparently disclosed online, requiring direct contact with the branch to compare rates and costs against competitors.
meta_description: World Finance at 3467 W 86th St, Indianapolis, IN. Personal loans with quick approvals and flexible repayment terms.
